title: alyssum dichotomum
intro: Alyssum dichotomum, also known as Dichotomous Alyssum, is a perennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, headache, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Alyssum dichotomum include its ability to improve digestion, relieve coughs and sore throats, and boost the immune system. Alyssum dichotomum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
